metadata.title: Ubuntu System Security Plan - FedRAMP High

authorization-boundary.description: Ubuntu Linux 24.04 LTS 5-server fleet operating within a single authorization boundary, including web, application, database, and management functions, with security configurations, access controls, monitoring, incident response, resilience, and system hardening measures
